creator: sylvestre@debian.org
text:
Upstream here.

uutils is the name of the org, coreutils is the name of the project.
to differentiate, please call it:
uutils-coreutils
or 
rust-coreutils

Freebsd is (almost) the exception (I made the same request for Gentoo)
https://uutils.github.io/user/installation.html

See https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/pull/4397#pullrequestreview-1305997268
